display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Already running a service mesh
Istio / Linkerd?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Use the mesh's Gateway
one data plane for north-south + east-west

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
On a managed cloud cluster
and want the cloud LB integrated?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cloud provider Gateway/Ingress controller
AKS/EKS/GKE native — owned by the cloud plugin

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Need advanced L7 features
WAF, auth, rate-limit at the edge?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A feature-rich controller
ingress-nginx, or an API-gateway-class controller
verify Gateway-API conformance at use

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
A conformant standard controller
ingress-nginx or a Gateway-API reference impl
